title: Argyreia longipes
taxonomy: Argyreia longipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is a member of the Convolvulaceae family, which includes morning glories and bindweeds. Argyreia longipes is a type of twining vine, native to parts of Asia. Within the Convolvulaceae family, Argyreia longipes is classified as part of the genus Argyreia. The specific classification for this species is Argyreia longipes, which is a combination of its genus and specific epithet.
